signal_watch.title: How to Build a Custom Agent Harness
signal_watch.author: LangChain
signal_watch.summary: Effective agents are built with harnesses that are tightly coupled with the task at hand. The easiest way to build a custom harness is with LangChain's create_agent plus middleware. This guide covers the core agent loop and how you can customize it for your agent's use case.
signal_watch.excerpt: Effective agents are built with harnesses that are tightly coupled with the task at hand. The easiest way to build a custom harness is with LangChain's create_agent plus middleware. This guide covers the core agent loop and how you can customize it for your agent's use case.

signal_watch.title: Tuning Deep Agents to Work Well with Different Models
signal_watch.author: LangChain
signal_watch.summary: Deep Agents was previously designed in a generic way to work well across model families. Today we’re adding model-specific profiles to adjust prompts, tools, and middleware. We ship profiles for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models out of the box, which we see leads to a 10–20 point jump on a subset of tau2-bench over the default harness.
signal_watch.excerpt: Deep Agents was previously designed in a generic way to work well across model families. Today we’re adding model-specific profiles to adjust prompts, tools, and middleware. We ship profiles for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models out of the box, which we see leads to a 10–20 point jump on a subset of tau2-bench over the default harness.
signal_watch.reason_selected: 当日新抓取且未展示过：Tuning Deep Agents to Work Well with Different Models 来自 LangChain 的公开抓取入口，证据链保留原始链接与抓取来源。

clusters.title: How we built LangChain’s GTM Agent
clusters.summary: Learn how we built a GTM agent that increased lead conversion by 250% while saving each sales rep 40 hours per month

clusters.title: How Box AI built enterprise content agents with Deep Agents
clusters.summary: See how Box built Box Agent on Deep Agents to search, analyze, and synthesize enterprise content while preserving security, permissions, and model flexibility.

clusters.title: How to Build a Custom Agent Harness
clusters.summary: Effective agents are built with harnesses that are tightly coupled with the task at hand. The easiest way to build a custom harness is with LangChain's create_agent plus middleware. This guide covers the core agent loop and how you can customize it for your agent's use case.

clusters.title: The Anatomy of an Agent Harness
clusters.summary: Learn how agent harnesses transform AI models into autonomous work engines. Explore core components: filesystems, sandboxes, and memory.

clusters.title: Tuning Deep Agents to Work Well with Different Models
clusters.summary: Deep Agents was previously designed in a generic way to work well across model families. Today we’re adding model-specific profiles to adjust prompts, tools, and middleware. We ship profiles for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models out of the box, which we see leads to a 10–20 point jump on a subset of tau2-bench over the default harness.

clusters.title: Announcing the YC AI Stack
clusters.summary: We've partnered with nearly two dozen companies to offer students who attend YC events a suite of over $25,000 in free credits for AI devtools.

clusters.title: YC x Coinbase RFS: Build Onchain
clusters.summary: We are entering the era of Fintech 3.0. Regulatory clarity, growing consumer adoption, and low-cost chains have paved the way for a golden age of building in crypto — and at YC, Base, and Coinbase, we want to fund builders to seize this moment.

clusters.title: Sonnet 5 review: I ran 64 generations to find out if it's worth it
clusters.summary: Watch now | 🎙 I built the How I AI Bench live using Claude Code, ran 5 frontier models through 64 blind prototype generations, PRDs, and agent voice tests, and the results surprised even me
